name: Service Puppet Play
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>傀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サービスト・パペット
desc: Target monsters your opponent controls, up to the number of "Gimmick Puppet" Xyz Monsters you control; take control of those monsters until the End Phase. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there, and you control a "Gimmick Puppet" Xyz Monster: You can banish this card, then target 1 Xyz Monster in either GY; Special Summon it to either field in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Service Puppet Play" once per turn.
eff: Target monsters your opponent controls, up to the number of "Gimmick Puppet" Xyz Monsters you control; take control of those monsters until the End Phase. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there, and you control a "Gimmick Puppet" Xyz Monster: You can banish this card, then target 1 Xyz Monster in either GY; Special Summon it to either field in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Service Puppet Play" once per turn.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard
Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
